name: Ai Interview Copilot — Live capture
description: Records practice-site tabs (LeetCode, HackerRank, Codeforces, AtCoder, CodeChef, TopCoder) and editor snapshots to your AiInterviewCopilot server.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:* wss://127.0.0.1:* wss://localhost:* https://leetcode.com https://*.leetcode.com https://www.hackerrank.com https://hackerrank.com https://*.hackerrank.com https://codeforces.com https://www.codeforces.com https://atcoder.jp https://*.atcoder.jp https://www.codechef.com https://codechef.com https://www.topcoder.com https://topcoder.com https://*.topcoder.com; object-src 'self'
